crime.value: Kidnapping of a young girl named Amber
crime.quote: hands knotted with deteriorating rope, and swollen scabbed over rope burns beneath it

victim.value: Amber, a young girl who appears to be a volleyball player, but unclear why she was targeted
victim.quote: Someone, someone grabbed me… But who? My memories were still hazy, like someone flushed water over them.

culprit_and_motive.value: A man with black eyes who kidnapped Amber, but motive is unclear
culprit_and_motive.quote: Black. His eyes were like black slits in his stubbly face.

investigator.value: Amber herself, narrating her own kidnapping and escape attempt
investigator.quote: Under my duct tape, I mumbled the phrase

red_herring.value: Dream sequence misdirection - victim wakes in pink bed suggesting rescue, but still captive
red_herring.quote: A sudden burst of blinding light, made her awake suddenly. She was lying in a small pink bed.

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence available to reader: black eyes, stubbly face, voice described for identification
clue_fairness.quote: Black. His eyes were like black slits in his stubbly face.

investigator_wound.value: Memory loss/fragmentation affecting victim's ability to identify original abductor
investigator_wound.quote: My memories were still hazy, like someone flushed water over them.

_meta.title: ebook amber rae a rae of sunshine
